{"cards": [{"name": "Skywatch Arbiter", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, scry 2.
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you gain 1 life and draw a card.", "flavor_text": ""Order and knowledge walk hand in hand toward enlightenment."", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius archetype signpost that rewards playing noncreature spells (instants, sorceries, enchantments, artifacts). Flying and scry represent blue's air domain and library manipulation, while lifegain represents white's defensive nature. The card draw engine encourages the controlling Azorius gameplan while providing immediate board presence."}, {"name": "Bloodpact Ravager", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Demon Warrior", "oracle_text": "Menace
When ~ enters, each player sacrifices a creature. If you can't, ~ deals 3 damage to you.
{1}{B}{R}: ~ gets +2/+0 and gains deathtouch until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.", "flavor_text": "It feeds on violence, whether inflicted or received.", "power": "3", "toughness": "3", "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that embodies both colors' aggressive and sacrificial themes. The ETB forces symmetrical sacrifice (black) but punishes you if you can't comply (red's self-damage). The activated ability provides reach and utility while being expensive enough to not dominate games. Menace ensures it can usually connect for damage."}, {"name": "Wayfarer's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{5}, {T}: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": ""Even the most twisted paths eventually lead somewhere."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple mana rock with expensive late-game utility. The {T}: Add {C} provides immediate mana fixing, while the expensive land search gives it relevance in longer games. Costed appropriately for common rarity - the land search is expensive enough to not be oppressive but provides meaningful late-game value."}, {"name": "Chronarch Engine", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, scry 3.
{2}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.
{5}, {T}, Sacrifice ~: Take an extra turn after this one.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact with multiple activated abilities showcasing proper tap/cost syntax. ETB scry provides immediate value. The first ability gives card advantage and selection. The ultimate ability is a powerful but expensive extra turn effect that requires sacrificing the engine. Each ability is costed appropriately for its power level."}, {"name": "Seraph of Final Judgment", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Kythara", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
-2: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its toughness.
-7: You get an emblem with "At the beginning of each end step, if a creature died this turn, create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "3", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker embodying white's lifegain and black's life drain. +1 provides incremental advantage and pressure. -2 is premium removal with white's compensation philosophy. Ultimate creates a powerful emblem that rewards creature-based strategies and board interaction. Starting loyalty of 3 makes it vulnerable but allows immediate impact."}]}
